game_info.title: Velocity Rivals
game_info.concept:
Cut-throat multiplayer running game that pits 4 players against each other, locally and/or online. Run, jump, swing around, and use devious weapons and pick-ups to knock opponents off-screen! One of the most competitive games you'll ever play. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/207140/SpeedRunners/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Cut-throat multiplayer running game that pits 4 players against each other, locally and/or online. Run, jump, swing around, and use devious weapons and pick-ups to knock opponents off-screen! One of the most competitive games you'll ever play.

In a city filled with superheroes, getting to crimes becomes a competition on its own. Fortunately there are enough rockets, bombs, grappling hooks, spikes, and other goodies lying around -- to make the competition fun and fast. Welcome to SpeedRunners.

SpeedRunners is a 4 player competitive platformer with grappling hooks, power-ups, and interactive environments. Run, jump, swing around, fire rockets, grapple onto people to knock them off screen.

Key Features

  • 4 Player Competitive Platforming!

  • Keep up with the fastest player in-game, or fall offscreen and get eliminated!

  • Use weapons like missiles, mines and grappling hooks to screw over your friends, and make new enemies!

  • Local and online multiplayer! Can you have 2 players on a couch against 2 other players on the internet? Yes of course!

  • Bots enabled - play on your own with several AI opponents. Or put them into matches with other people!

  • A tutorial teaches you how to play

  • Controller compatible (and recommended!)

  • A dozen expertly designed maps

  • Unique game modifiers

  • A character named Unic!

  • Full blown level editor with over 10k user created levels

  • An exciting single player campaign

  • Create your own custom in-game trails (visible when you hit super-speed)
game_info.description:
Welcome to "Velocity Rivals," a high-octane competitive multiplayer platformer! You are a speed-runner competing against 3 ruthless AI opponents in a looping cyberpunk arena.

Your goal is simple: Run fast, survive, and be the last one standing.

As you race, the camera follows the leader. If you fall off the screen (get left behind, fall into a pit, or hit the ceiling too hard), you are eliminated. Use your grappling hook to swing over deadly spikes and large gaps. Collect power-ups to blast your enemies or boost your own speed.

The last runner remaining wins the round!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Right: Run
- Arrow Up / Down: Aim grappling hook / Look
- Z: Jump (Press again on walls to Wall Jump)
- Shift: Fire Grappling Hook (Hold to swing)
- Space: Use collected Power-up (Rocket, Bomb, Burst)
- ESC: Pause Game
- R: Restart (from Game Over)
- Enter: Start Game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and physics integration.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate holding the Right Arrow key for 60 frames. Monitor the player's X coordinate.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player's X coordinate should increase significantly relative to the starting position.

TEST_2.strategy_description: Simulate pressing the Z key (Jump) while on the ground. Monitor Y velocity and Y position.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player should move upward (Y decreases), then fall back down due to gravity after the peak.

TEST_3.test_description: Test grappling hook connection and physics.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Position player under a hook point. Simulate holding Shift. Monitor vertical velocity and "isGrappling" state.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player state should change to "swinging", and gravity should be counteracted by hook tension.
TEST_3.description: Test grappling hook connection and physics.
TEST_3.strategy: Position player under a hook point. Simulate holding Shift. Monitor vertical velocity and "isGrappling" state.
TEST_3.expected: Player state should change to "swinging", and gravity should be counteracted by hook tension.

TEST_7.test_description: Full Game Loop / Win Condition (Stress Test).
TEST_7.strategy_description: Run game with "God Mode" player (invincible) and fast forward until bots die.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Game phase should transition to "GAME_OVER_WIN" when all opponents are eliminated.
